body.title: Installer stage 1: setup_assets scaffolding + templates + bug fixes
body.result: setup_assets/ + 8 cfg templates + installer stub. igor.bat fix, install_igor_linux.sh fix, .gitignore gitignore patterns. Fixed 6 test regressions from T-pe-multi-file+preflight. 1868 tests pass.
body.description: Create wild_igor/setup_assets/ dir, cfg templates (swarm/igor/switches/models/credentials/context), installer.py stub. Fix igor.bat (igor_loop.ps1→igor.ps1). Fix install_igor_linux.sh Step 7 (hardcoded /home/akien/.claude/hooks/ → $HOME/.claude/hooks/). No behavior changes.
